summary: Iteration 39 - Admin Statistics Dashboard testing. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend admin stats page verified with all UI components working correctly. Access control verified - non-admin users cannot see admin nav or access /admin/stats.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/stats returns 200 with full statistics structure - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats?window=today filters by today - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats?window=7d filters by 7 days - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats?window=30d filters by 30 days - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats?window=all returns all-time data - VERIFIED
Admin stats endpoint returns 403 for non-admin users - VERIFIED
Admin stats endpoint returns 401 for unauthenticated requests - VERIFIED
Stats response includes users.total, users.new_today, users.active_today, users.inactive_30d - VERIFIED
Stats response includes users.segments (never_started, started_then_dropped, used_then_stopped) - VERIFIED
Stats response includes practices.total, practices.active, practices.completed, practices.blocked, practices.completion_rate - VERIFIED
Stats response includes trends.daily (14 data points) and trends.weekly (8 data points) - VERIFIED
Stats response includes operational.top_procedures and operational.most_blocked - VERIFIED
New user registration creates user with plan='free' and plan_status='active' fields - VERIFIED
Admin stats page renders at /admin/stats (data-testid='admin-stats-page') - VERIFIED
KPI row shows 4 cards (data-testid='kpi-users', 'kpi-practices', 'kpi-completed', 'kpi-active') - VERIFIED
User metrics block renders (data-testid='user-metrics') - VERIFIED
User segmentation block renders with progress bars (data-testid='user-segments') - VERIFIED
Practice metrics block renders with status distribution (data-testid='practice-metrics') - VERIFIED
Daily trend chart renders (data-testid='daily-trend') - VERIFIED
Weekly trend chart renders (data-testid='weekly-trend') - VERIFIED
Top procedures list renders (data-testid='top-procedures') - VERIFIED
Most blocked list renders (data-testid='most-blocked') - VERIFIED
Time window selector works (data-testid='window-selector', 'window-today', 'window-7d', 'window-30d', 'window-all') - VERIFIED
Sidebar shows 'Statistiche' nav item only for admin (data-testid='nav-admin-stats') - VERIFIED
Non-admin users cannot access /admin/stats page - redirected to dashboard - VERIFIED
All UI text is in Italian as required - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified the Admin Statistics Dashboard feature. Key verified: (1) GET /api/admin/stats endpoint returns full statistics with users, practices, trends, operational blocks. (2) Window parameter filters work (today, 7d, 30d, all). (3) Access control: 403 for non-admin, 401 for unauthenticated. (4) New user registration adds plan='free' and plan_status='active' fields. (5) Frontend AdminStatsPage renders all components: KPI cards, user metrics, user segments with progress bars, practice metrics with status distribution, daily/weekly trend charts, top procedures, most blocked. (6) Window selector buttons work. (7) Admin nav item 'Statistiche' only visible for admin users. (8) Non-admin users redirected to dashboard when accessing /admin/stats. (9) All UI in Italian.

details: total, active, completed, blocked, completion_rate present
Statistiche nav only visible for admin
